channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jeffrey Sachs Analyzes the Decline of U.S. Global Influence and Emerging Global Realignments
item.description: Economist Jeffrey Sachs warns that the United States is losing its capacity to maintain global dominance, creating instability worldwide. According to Sachs, U.S. confrontations with Iran, Russia, and...

item.title: Cumberland, B.C., Explores Geothermal Energy from Abandoned Coal Mines
item.description: Cumberland, British Columbia, a town historically shaped by coal mining, is now exploring a sustainable energy future by repurposing its abandoned mine tunnels for geothermal energy. Through the Unive...

item.title: Former Alberta Premier Kenney urges pro-Canada groups to respond to separatist referendum push
item.description: Former Alberta Premier Jason Kenney has called on those supporting Alberta's continued membership in Canada to become more organized and vocal as a separatist movement pushes for a provincial independ...

item.title: Supreme Court ruling in Louisiana v Callais continues challenges to Black voting rights
item.description: The recent Supreme Court ruling in Louisiana v Callais marks the latest development in a long history of attacks on Black voting rights in the United States. Since the ratification of the 15th Amendme...

item.title: TV Review: Amanda Shines in Inventive and Humorous Second Series of Amandaland
item.description: The BBC One comedy Amandaland has returned for its second series, and TV critic Christopher Stevens praises it as lively, inventive, and full of humour. The festive special last year, featuring Jennif...

item.title: Edwin Sifuna Supports Opposition Unity to Present One Candidate Against Ruto in 2027
item.description: Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna, who is also the ODM Linda Mwananchi principal, has indicated that his team may join forces with the United Opposition led by former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua ahea...

item.title: Election Commission directs West Bengal authorities to prevent post-poll violence and arrest culprits
item.description: Following the conclusion of the West Bengal Assembly elections 2026, the Chief Election Commissioner (CEC) Gyanesh Kumar has issued strict instructions to the State administration to ensure zero toler...

item.title: Trump expresses optimism on Iran deal while warning of possible military action if negotiations collapse
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump said that a renewed agreement with Iran is still 'very possible,' showing a level of optimism about ongoing diplomatic efforts between the two countries. However, he a...

item.title: Top 19 Restaurants in Manila for Celebrating Mother’s Day
item.description: Looking for the perfect spot to celebrate Mother’s Day in Manila? This guide highlights 19 restaurants across the city that offer exceptional dining experiences for the occasion. From fine dining esta...

item.title: WA biotech collaboration develops RNA therapies to tackle insulin resistance in type 2 diabetes
item.description: A Western Australian biotech partnership is aiming to expand diabetes treatment beyond current GLP-1 therapies like Ozempic. ProGenis Pharmaceuticals, in collaboration with Perth-based Syngenis Labs, ...

item.title: Health Canada Launches Voluntary Breast Implant Registry, Sparks Concern Among Advocates and Experts
item.description: Health Canada has introduced a voluntary breast implant registry that enables patients and health-care professionals to receive direct notifications about recalls and safety issues. The initiative aim...

item.title: Los Angeles City Council Votes to Restrict Minor Traffic Stops Amid Racial Disparity Concerns
item.description: The Los Angeles City Council voted unanimously to impose new restrictions on 'pretextual' traffic stops, a practice often criticized for disproportionately affecting Black and Latino drivers. These st...

item.title: AIIMS INI SS July 2026 Result Announcement and Access Issue
item.description: The AIIMS INI SS July 2026 results have been officially declared. However, candidates trying to access the official result link are encountering an access restriction message, indicating that they do ...

item.title: Philippine GDP growth slows to 2.8% in Q1 2026 amid economic challenges
item.description: The Philippine economy experienced a notable slowdown in the first quarter of 2026, with gross domestic product (GDP) growth registering at only 2.8 percent. This figure reflects a deceleration compar...

item.title: How Pakistan’s online humour and narrative strategy shaped the 2025 information war
item.description: The article argues that during the May 2025 India-Pakistan conflict, the real decisive battle was not only military but digital, and Pakistan unexpectedly gained the upper hand in the information spac...

item.title: Radio Host Xtremme Shares His Journey to Marriage with Dithapelo
item.description: Xolani “Xtremme” Mthombeni, a popular radio broadcaster, recently shared the journey of his relationship with Dithapelo Segodi, culminating in their wedding. They first met at work in 2023, where Dith...

item.title: Federal Ministry of Health partners VIYA Health and Incepta to increase access to WHO-approved contraceptive
item.description: Abuja, Nigeria – The Federal Ministry of Health and Social Welfare don collaborate with VIYA Health Nigeria and Incepta Pharmaceuticals to increase availability of high-quality family planning product...

item.title: Cruise Ship Infected with Virus Heads to Spain While Evacuees Arrive in Europe
item.description: A cruise ship recently affected by a viral outbreak is now on course to Spain, following reports of infections among passengers. Authorities in Europe have already facilitated the evacuation of some p...

item.title: Debate Grows on the Role of Former Presidents in Kenya’s Active Politics
item.description: This opinion piece discusses the growing debate in Kenya around the political involvement of former President Uhuru Kenyatta. The writer argues that while the Constitution allows any citizen, includin...

item.title: Tanzania and Kenya Strengthen Cross-Border Investments for Regional Growth
item.description: Dar es Salaam — There is growing energy in cross-border investments between Tanzania and Kenya as both countries push for stronger economic cooperation. Business leaders and policymakers are encouragi...
